info.title: Bunny Shield API
info.description: Bunny.net API for Bunny Shield (WAF, DDoS, Rate Limiting, Bot Detection, Access Lists & API Guardian).

get.summary: Get all Access Lists available for a Shield Zone

parameters.name: shieldZoneId
parameters.description: The ID of the Shield Zone to which the Access Lists belong.

schema.description: The ID of the Shield Zone to which the Access Lists belong.

listId.description: The unique identifier of the access list.

configurationId.description: The unique identifier of the access list configuration.

name.description: The display name of the access list.

description.description: Optional description of the access list's purpose or contents.

isEnabled.description: Indicates whether the access list is currently enabled and active.

entryCount.description: The total number of entries currently in the access list.

updateFrequency.description: How frequently the list is updated from its source. Only applicable to managed lists.

lastUpdated.description: The timestamp when the access list was last updated.

AccessListDetails.description: Represents detailed information about an access list and its configuration.

managedLists.description: List of curated threat lists maintained by Bunny Shield with automatic updates.

customLists.description: List of custom access lists created and maintained by the user.

customEntryCount.description: Total number of entries across all custom access lists for this Shield Zone.

customEntryLimit.description: Maximum number of entries allowed across all custom access lists based on the Shield plan.

customListCount.description: Current number of custom access lists for this Shield Zone.

customListLimit.description: Maximum number of custom access lists allowed based on the Shield plan.

AccessListsDetailsResponse.description: Response containing comprehensive access list information for a Shield Zone, including both managed and custom lists.

isEnabled.description: Whether API Guardian is enabled for this shield zone. When disabled, no requests are inspected.

title.description: The `info.title` field from the uploaded OpenAPI specification.

version.description: The `info.version` field from the uploaded OpenAPI specification.

maxEndpoints.description: Plan limit: maximum number of endpoints that can be defined in the specification.

maxFieldsPerType.description: Plan limit: maximum number of properties a single schema object may declare.

maxNestingDepth.description: Plan limit: maximum depth of nested `$ref`, `items`, and `properties` chains.

maxTotalSchemaNodes.description: Plan limit: combined node count across all `components/schemas` entries.

maxTotalRegexLength.description: Plan limit: combined character length of all `pattern` regex strings in the specification.

ApiGuardianConfigurationDetails.description: Global API Guardian configuration for a shield zone.

endpoints.description: All endpoints discovered from the uploaded OpenAPI specification.

ApiGuardianConfigurationResponse.description: The full API Guardian state for a shield zone: global configuration and all endpoints.

validateRequestBodySchema.description: Whether inbound request bodies are validated against the OAS request body schema.

validateResponseBodySchema.description: Whether outbound response bodies are validated against the OAS response schema.

isEnabled.description: Whether this endpoint is active. Disabled endpoints are not enforced.

authSchemes.description:
Authentication schemes required by this endpoint, derived from the OAS security requirements.
Null when the endpoint has no security requirements.

requestBodySchemaYaml.description: The request body schema rendered as YAML for display purposes. Null if no request body is defined.

responseBodySchemasYaml.description: Response body schemas keyed by HTTP status code, rendered as YAML. Null if no response schemas are defined.

availableParameters.description: All parameters defined in the OAS operation, grouped by location (path, query, header, cookie).

injectionDetectionParameters.description:
Parameters selected for XSS/SQLi injection detection, grouped by location.
Null if not configured. Subset of BunnyNet.Shield.Api.Services.Shield.ApiGuardian.Models.ApiGuardianEndpointDetails.AvailableParameters.

detectParameterXss.description: Whether XSS detection is enabled for the selected parameters.

detectParameterSqli.description: Whether SQL injection detection is enabled for the selected parameters.

rateLimitingEnabled.description: Whether per-endpoint rate limiting is active.

rateLimitingRequestCount.description: Maximum number of requests allowed within the rate limiting timeframe before blocking.

ApiGuardianEndpointDetails.description:
Detailed view of a single API Guardian endpoint, including its validation settings,
authentication requirements, and rate limiting configuration.

AuthLocation.description: Where an authentication credential is transmitted in the HTTP request.

schemeName.description: The OpenAPI security scheme reference name (e.g. "bearerAuth", "apiKey").

credentialName.description:
The name of the header, query parameter, or cookie that carries the credential
(e.g. "Authorization", "X-API-Key").

httpScheme.description: For HTTP auth schemes, the scheme name (e.g. "bearer", "basic"). Null for non-HTTP schemes.

AuthSchemeDetails.description:
Describes a single authentication scheme required by an endpoint,
as extracted from the OpenAPI specification's securitySchemes.

AuthSchemeType.description: The type of security scheme as defined in the OpenAPI specification.

name.description: The display name for the new access list.

description.description: Optional description of the access list's purpose or contents.

content.description: The initial content for the access list with entries separated by newlines.

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the content for integrity verification. If null, it will be automatically calculated.

CreateCustomAccessListRequest.description: Request model for creating a new custom access list.

CreateShieldZoneRequest.description: Represents a request to create a new Shield Zone.

CreateShieldZoneResponse.description: Response object for creating a new Shield Zone.

id.description: The unique identifier of the custom access list.

name.description: The display name of the custom access list.

description.description: Optional description of the access list's purpose or contents.

content.description: The raw content of the access list with entries separated by newlines.

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the content for integrity verification.

entryCount.description: The total number of entries in the access list.

lastModified.description: The timestamp when the access list was last modified.

CustomAccessList.description: Represents a custom access list associated with a shield zone.

CustomAccessListResponse.description: Response containing custom access list data or error information.

success.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the result of the operation.

errorKey.description: Unique error key for programmatic error handling, if applicable.

GenericRequestResponse.description: Generic response object containing status information for API operations.

GetApiGuardianResponse.description: Represents the response for getting API Guardian configuration.

isEnabled.description: Whether the access list should be enabled or disabled. If null, the current state is preserved.

UpdateAccessListConfigurationRequest.description: Request model for updating an access list configuration.

UpdateAccessListConfigurationResponse.description: Response containing the updated access list configuration data or error information.

isEnabled.description: Enable or disable API Guardian entirely for this shield zone.

UpdateApiGuardianConfigurationRequest.description:
Patch request for updating the global API Guardian configuration.
All fields are optional — only provided fields are applied.

isEnabled.description: Enable or disable this endpoint. Disabled endpoints are not enforced.

validateRequestBodySchema.description:
Enable or disable request body schema validation.
Only effective if the endpoint's OAS operation defines a request body schema.

validateResponseBodySchema.description:
Enable or disable response body schema validation.
Only effective if the endpoint's OAS operation defines response schemas.

validateAuthorization.description:
Enable or disable enforcement of authentication requirements
as defined in the OAS security schemes.

injectionDetectionParameters.description:
Parameters to run injection detection on, grouped by location (path, query, header, cookie).
Must be a subset of the endpoint's available parameters.

detectParameterXss.description: Enable XSS detection on the selected injection detection parameters.

detectParameterSqli.description: Enable SQL injection detection on the selected injection detection parameters.

rateLimitingEnabled.description: Enable or disable per-endpoint rate limiting.

rateLimitingRequestCount.description: Maximum number of requests allowed within the timeframe before blocking. Must be greater than zero.

UpdateApiGuardianEndpointRequest.description:
Patch request for updating an individual API Guardian endpoint.
All fields are optional — only provided fields are applied.

name.description: The new display name for the access list. If null, the current name is preserved.

content.description: The new content for the access list with entries separated by newlines. If null, the current content is preserved.

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the new content for integrity verification. If null, it will be automatically calculated.

UpdateCustomAccessListRequest.description: Request model for updating a custom access list.

content.description: The file contents of the OpenAPI specification.

enforceAuthorizationValidation.description:
Whether to enforce authentication requirements for endpoints.
On upload, defaults to true if not specified.
On update, existing endpoint auth settings are preserved if not specified.

UpsertOpenApiSpecificationRequest.description: Represents the request for uploading or updating an OpenAPI specification in API Guardian.

UpsertOpenApiSpecificationResponse.description: Represents the response for uploading or updating an OpenAPI specification in API Guardian.

AccessKey.description: API key passed through the AccessKey header
AccessKey.name: AccessKey
